reading.title: Reading: A shopping list
reading.passage: I have an apple and some bananas. I have some tomatoes, maybe five or six. We need three eggs for the cake. Let's buy some onions too.

questions.question: The writer needs three eggs.
questions.explanation: "We need three eggs for the cake."

questions.question: How many tomatoes does the writer have?
questions.explanation: "I have some tomatoes, maybe five or six."

reading.title: Reading: In the kitchen
reading.passage: I have some rice for dinner, maybe two kilos. There isn't much water in the bottle. I need a little sugar for the cake, just two spoons. There isn't much milk left in the fridge.

questions.question: There is a lot of water in the bottle.
questions.explanation: "There isn't much water in the bottle."

questions.question: The writer needs a little sugar.
questions.explanation: "I need a little sugar for the cake".
